componentDescription: A customizable radio button for user selection in forms, offering various sizes and label positions.

id.description: Optional unique identifier for the radio input.

icon.description: Optional React node to be displayed as an icon within or alongside the radio.

error.description: Optional error state indicator or message for the radio.

name.description: The name attribute for the radio input, used for grouping radio buttons.

label.description: The text label associated with the radio input.

value.description: The value associated with the radio input when selected.

isChecked.description: Determines if the radio button is currently checked (controlled state).

defaultIsSelected.description: Sets the initial selected state of the radio button (uncontrolled state).

isReadOnly.description: Indicates if the radio button is read-only, preventing user interaction.

isDisabled.description: Indicates if the radio button is disabled, making it unclickable.

labelPosition.description: Specifies the position of the label relative to the radio input.

onChange.description: Callback function triggered when the radio button's checked state changes.

onValueChange.description: Callback function triggered specifically when the radio button's value changes.

views.typeValues: { radio?: ViewProps; label?: ViewProps; infoText?: ViewProps; }
views.description: Custom styles or view configurations for the radio component.

size.description: Defines the visual size of the radio component.

shadow.description: Applies shadow effects or elevation styles to the radio component.

infoText.description: Optional supplementary text providing additional information about the radio.

isHovered.description: Internal state property indicating if the radio component is currently hovered.

setIsHovered.description: Setter function to update the `isHovered` state.

isSelected.description: Internal state property indicating if the radio component is currently selected.

setIsSelected.description: Setter function to update the `isSelected` state.
